metadata.title: Sharp 2v1 Clutch with Smooth Peeks and Steady Aim in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a tight 2v1 where smart positioning and calm aim turn the round around. Notice how timing the peeks just right seals the win.
What’s your go-to angle when the pressure’s on?
